mapper.sql: code, indicator_name, category, data_type, default_unit, loinc_code, normal_low, normal_high, status, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM indicator_dict ORDER BY code ASC

SELECT
FROM indicator_dict WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY code ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO indicator_dict ( code, indicator_name, category, data_type, default_unit, loinc_code, normal_low, normal_high, status ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{indicatorName}, #{category}, #{dataType}, #{defaultUnit}, #{loincCode}, #{normalLow}, #{normalHigh}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE indicator_dict SET indicator_name = #{indicatorName}, category = #{category}, data_type = #{dataType}, default_unit = #{defaultUnit}, loinc_code = #{loincCode}, normal_low = #{normalLow}, normal_high = #{normalHigh}, status = #{status} WHERE code = #{code}
